notes: Starter state: units begin at max HP from rulesets/territory-v1/units.json.
E003 locked starter: max-HP starter board copied from territory-v1 with ruleset id changed to territory-v1-locked.
E005 map-access starter: max-HP starter board copied from E003 and retargeted to sketch-v2-access.
E006 cost-6 starter: copied from E005 access starter and retargeted to territory-v1-cost6.
E007 damage-cap starter: copied from E006 cost-6 starter and retargeted to territory-v1-cost6-damagecap.
E020 recenter starter: copied from E013 contest starter and retargeted to sketch-v5-recenter, which moves center-center-south from (5,7) to (7,5).

E022 high-movement starter: copied from E020 recenter starter and retargeted to territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove. Unit movement is substantially increased while cards, economy, damage cap, and lead-4 response-window win timing stay unchanged.

E023 high-movement late-center starter: copied from E022 high-movement starter and retargeted to territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-centermid. Adds a late center-majority response-window win while preserving high movement, economy, damage cap, and lead-4 unit-count win.

E024 high-movement six-center starter: copied from E023 high-movement center-majority starter and retargeted to territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6. Adds a stronger late six-center dominance response-window win while preserving high movement, economy, damage cap, and lead-4 unit-count win.
